name: Nextware Ltd.
summary: Nextware Ltd. provides IT consulting services in Japan. The company is involved in the computer system design and software development activities; rental, sale, import, and export of computers and its peripherals; operational management and support of computer systems; and computer system consulting business. It also engages in consulting and management, events planning and operation contracting, and damages insurance agency businesses. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
